offer: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/month, inefficient inventory management causes stockouts and late shipments. We provide inventory monitoring and reorder alerts instead of manual inventory tracking and reorder processes.
problem: Inefficient inventory management leading to stockouts and late shipments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums for Amazon sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try inventory monitoring and reorder alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
